creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
It's failing between 05/21 and 06/09:

$ kyua debug -k /usr/tests/lib/libc/string/Kyuafile memcpy_test:memcpy_basic
memcpy_test:memcpy_basic  ->  failed: Test case was expecting a failure but none were raised
$ uname -a
FreeBSD fbsd11 11.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #1 r300379:300380: Sat May 21 16:56:18 PDT 2016     ngie@fbsd11:/usr/obj/usr/src/svn/sys/GENERIC-NODEBUG  amd64
$

Tying it down a bit more, it seems to have started failing in the last week or two, so a change was likely introduced late May that's causing this.
